title: matelea marcoassisii
intro: Matelea marcoassisii is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or milkweed family. This plant is native to Madagascar and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Matelea marcoassisii include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. Matelea marcoassisii is often prepared as a tea or infusion for consumption, and its extracts can also be used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
